item.description:
Release v4.15.1

Changes since v4.15.0

  • docs(sub-agent): finalize protocol-level sub-agent architecture design
  • feat(ask-user): pass verbosity context through ToolCallRowMessageContext
  • feat(ask-user): render AskUser messages based on VerbosityPlugin level
  • feat(layout): log rail/middle/chat column widths on divider change
  • feat(layout): tidy LayoutPlugin local store, storage keys, and root/menu views
  • feat(lumiapp): sync panel column width to layout state on resize
  • feat(plugin): fire didRegister and appDidLaunch lifecycle events for alwaysOn plugins
  • fix: add missing LumiChatKit import in ToolService
  • fix: resolve non-Sendable property access in MenuBarService deinit
  • fix(chat): do not skip tool-approval gate on truncated JSON arguments
  • fix(chat): resume tool-approval continuation on cancel to prevent deadlock
  • fix(core-kit): protect localization catalog cache with OSAllocatedUnfairLock
  • fix(git): add repository validation before libgit2 operations to prevent EXC_BREAKPOINT crash
  • fix(layout): drop idealWidth on ChatSectionView to stop divider rollback
  • fix(llm-provider): fix MiniMax API endpoint and add MiniMax-M3 model
  • fix(llm-provider): replace fatalError in base classes with safe defaults for checkAvailability and providerStatus
  • fix(lumiapp): disambiguate chatSection split view by picking outermost
  • fix(lumiapp): post-attach recheck to handle nested split view creation order
  • fix(menu-bar): subscribe to LogoRegistry. to show logo after plugin contributions ready
  • i18n: translate or localize content
